title: INT. Altar of My Ego
content:
INT. Altar of My Ego

currently room within larger structure:

Narccisist Breeding Dojo (complete w undying souls that roam in hope to please the immortal narcissist; names not remembered or worth spending time or thought on; can we not?)

"I don't know how to pronoun any other than my first person pronoun, no I do not see or make eye contact with other as not there and also there to laugh and validate on queue; a miracle paradox of application to all but me rules;

"I'm sorry and you're welcome! All questions rhetorical and only one mic, my mic, save all individual impulse or thought for literally furnace, amplification not necessary as all listen with full attention, but does make shoulders and chest more alpha than beta, erego omega and every in between, no consent required

"Take out your wallets, and If you too would like to isolate and instead of removing have removed any thing other than self, please continue (note: I am the only I, any other variation negligible insignificant miscarriage of IMeMine;

"for self reminding, you can watch and listen and learn, but not done for other, done for the flexing in mirror and the catching of bears and trees actions when thought alone...
context: From document: INT. Altar of My Ego — chunk 1 (chunk 1/4)
